title: Alchemical Emblems — Gallery 3
description: 40 alchemical emblems including Fludd's microcosm/macrocosm, Etteilla's seven hermetic degrees, Ercker's subterranean world, Khunrath's Amphitheatrum, and emblems of the ascension of the wise, the alchemical tree, and the starry heavens.
notes: Fludd's macrocosm/microcosm imagery is key for the mundus imaginalis concept.
